data.message:
Unable to access the selected device due to:

Microphone (Scarlett Solo USB) does not have any lines supporting PCM_SIGNED 96000.0 Hz, 16 bit, stereo, 4 bytes/frame,little-endian

Try a different sample rate

Make sure that in Windows Settings > Privacy > Microphone Allow desktop apps to access your microphone is On and that the sample rate of the default format in the Windows audio properties for the device matches the REW sample rate.
